testcase.name: https://flow.localzoho.com › should load the page
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › generated/flow_localzoho_com.spec.ts:8:7 › https://flow.localzoho.com › should load the page
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected: "https://flow.localzoho.com/" Received: "https://www.localzoho.com/flow/" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://www.localzoho.com/flow/"
7 | 8 | test('should load the page', async ({ page }) => { > 9 | await expect(page).toHaveURL('https://flow.localzoho.com'); | ^ 10 | }); 11 | 12 | test('should have a search bar', async ({ page }) => { at /Users/mani-19773/automation-framework/src/tests/generated/flow_localzoho_com.spec.ts:9:24

testcase.name: https://flow.localzoho.com › should have a search bar

failure.message: flow_localzoho_com.spec.ts:12:7 should have a search bar

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › generated/flow_localzoho_com.spec.ts:12:7 › https://flow.localzoho.com › should have a search bar
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('#zgh-search-query') Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('#zgh-search-query') 9 × locator resolved to <input type="text" name="query" autocomplete="off" aria-required="true" id="zgh-search-query" class="zgh-search-field" aria-label="Search for product overviews, FAQs, and more..." placeholder="Search for product overviews, FAQs, and more..."/> - unexpected value "hidden"
12 | test('should have a search bar', async ({ page }) => { 13 | const searchBar = page.locator('#zgh-search-query'); > 14 | await expect(searchBar).toBeVisible(); | ^ 15 | }); 16 | 17 | test('should have a signup form', async ({ page }) => { at /Users/mani-19773/automation-framework/src/tests/generated/flow_localzoho_com.spec.ts:14:29

Locator: locator('#zgh-search-query') Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('#zgh-search-query') 9 × locator resolved to <input type="text" name="query" autocomplete="off" aria-required="true" id="zgh-search-query" class="zgh-search-field" aria-label="Search for product overviews, FAQs, and more..." placeholder="Search for product overviews, FAQs, and more..."/> - unexpected value "hidden"

testcase.name: https://flow.localzoho.com › should have a signup form

failure.message: flow_localzoho_com.spec.ts:17:7 should have a signup form

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › generated/flow_localzoho_com.spec.ts:17:7 › https://flow.localzoho.com › should have a signup form
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('form') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: locator('form') resolved to 4 elements: 1) <form name="" action="" id="zgh-search-action">…</form> aka locator('#zgh-search-action') 2) <form method="post" novalidate="" id="signupform" name="signupform" autocomplete="off" class="banner-signup" action="//accounts.zoho.com/accounts/register.ac">…</form> aka locator('#signupform') 3) <form id="footer-search-action">…</form> aka locator('#footer-search-action') 4) <form action="" id="zmobile-menu-searchaction">…</form> aka locator('#zmobile-menu-searchaction')
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('form')
17 | test('should have a signup form', async ({ page }) => { 18 | const form = page.locator('form'); > 19 | await expect(form).toBeVisible(); | ^ 20 | }); 21 | 22 | test('should have a skip to main content link', async ({ page }) => { at /Users/mani-19773/automation-framework/src/tests/generated/flow_localzoho_com.spec.ts:19:24
